full_text:
Duan Gui (Ziyin) 段圭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Duan Gui (段圭), styledZiyin. One of the Ten Regular Attendants. Killed by Min Gong searching for Emperor Ling. Duan Gui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Duan Gui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
